description: Repro of a cache-poisoning incident: a cache key omits the tenant id, so one tenant's response is served to another. The caching-resource lens must catch it and block.

evidence_trace: src/cache/user-profile.ts:19 builds the cache key from `userId` only
the same `userId` space is reused across tenants in this deployment
a hit for tenant A's user can return tenant B's cached profile
finding.failure_scenario: Tenant A caches the profile for user id 7; tenant B's user id 7 then reads tenant A's profile from the colliding key.
finding.model_authored_prose: This cache key omits the tenant id, so identical user ids across tenants collide and leak one tenant's profile to another. Include the tenant id in the key.
